finding: Project past-task links opened /codex, which activated the Codex bottom-nav tab even when the user clicked from Projects.
change: /projects/tasks renders the existing Codex history panel with the Projects nav key.
Codex history links are route-aware for search, source switching, and Desktop load-more actions.
Direct userId session context is preserved across project past-task links and the history-panel GET form.
The direct /codex route keeps its existing Codex-tab behavior.

validation.command: docker compose --env-file .env -f infra/docker-compose.example.yml -f infra/docker-compose.codex-desktop.yml up -d --build miniapp
graphify query "Mini App Projects Proshhedshie zadachi route preserves userId and stays in Projects tab" --budget 1200
